ticket_recommendations.title: Restore a legal reconciliation and closeout-publication path for invalidated superseded tickets
ticket_recommendations.repair_class: Scafforge package work required before the next subject-repo repair run
ticket_recommendations.summary: Fix `ticket_reconcile`, remove the artifactless superseded-ticket deadlock, and keep `handoff_publish` from blocking forever on a state the toolchain cannot legally repair.

ticket_recommendations.title: Keep repeated lifecycle blockers from turning into retry loops
ticket_recommendations.summary: Hold the team leader, workflow skill, and regression fixtures to stop-on-repeat lifecycle behavior.

ticket_recommendations.title: Preserve specialist-owned artifacts and proof-before-PASS enforcement
ticket_recommendations.summary: Prevent coordinator-authored specialist artifacts and reject PASS-style closeout claims when execution evidence is missing.
